prompt: Single matte white kettle on a brushed concrete kitchen counter, photographed slightly from above with soft directional north light, muted palette of cool greys and a single deep restrained green (#3a9e62) accent in the background. Negative space dominates the right two-thirds of the frame. UK domestic context. No people, no text, no logos, no plants, no clutter. Editorial, honest, considered, photorealistic, 35mm prime. --ar 21:9 --style raw --v 7
notes: Append --oref <anchor-url> --ow 400 when running. Variants for other kitchen categories (air fryer, toaster, coffee pod machine) reuse this template — swap the device noun only.
prompt_modifications: Live prompt diverged from locked v1 during the 2026-04-29 session. See resourcehip_website/brand/GENERATION_LOG.md for the actually-run prompt and the rationale per asset.
